name: git-pr-metrics
description: Pluggable Pull Request metrics for team repos: merged count, review times, cycles, per-engineer stats

scripts.start: npm run build && npm run metrics
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run build && nodemon" "wait-on -t 15000 http://localhost:3000 && browser-sync start -p 3001 -f 'public/**' 'dist/**' --proxy localhost:3000"
